subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of Bahá! The letter thou didst pen from Maragheh was received, and a fresh fragrance was wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان بها مکتوبی که از مراغه مرقوم نموده بودید رسید و نفحه جدیده وزید
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant
